claimText: Vehicle-to-Grid (V2G) technology allows electric vehicle batteries to function as decentralized energy storage by sending power back to the electrical grid.
evidenceExcerpt: V2G enables EV batteries to send power back to the grid, acting as decentralized energy storage.
examUse: Statement-based question on the definition and function of V2G technology.

claimText: A pilot project for Vehicle-to-Grid (V2G) technology was initiated by the Kerala State Electricity Board (KSEB) and IIT Bombay.
evidenceExcerpt: Kerala State Electricity Board (KSEB) and IIT Bombay initiated a pilot project for V2G technology.
examUse: Factual statement in a multi-statement question regarding V2G initiatives in India.

claimText: V2G technology facilitates the integration of Renewable Energy (RE) and improves grid stability by modulating power to reduce the impact of variable RE.
evidenceExcerpt: V2G helps modulate power in EV batteries to improve grid stability against variable RE impacts.
examUse: Conceptual question on the applications and grid-level benefits of V2G technology.
